title: hierochloe odorata subsp. arctica
intro: Hierochloe odorata subsp. arctica, also known as Sweet Grass, is a subspecies of a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Hierochloe odorata subsp. arctica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
